title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. Hot meals, grab and go meals and snacks, and shower/laundry access will be provided. There is no co-ed sleeping. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed but must be crated or leashed. Must not have a level 3 sex offense or arson conviction. Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-8am Saturday, November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Intake: 6pm-10:30pm Doors are locked between 10:30pm-5am (541) 962-7994 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
